Title: As PMS System, I want leads to be created online via API Integration
Description:
Examples of Microsites:
sunwayflora.com
sunwayartessa.com

Listing of Microsites can be found in: https://sunwaysharedservices.sharepoint.com/sites/SunwayProperty-LoanDocTrackingProject802-FastKey/Shared%20Documents/CRM-FastKey/4.%20Go-live/Management-Lead%20Source%20&%20Campaign/MasterList%20of%20Campaign%20and%20Source.xlsx?web=1

Currently in Fastkey / PMS 

Fastkey - Uses phone number only to identify a lead. 
Example: Shawn registers in sunwayflora.com with +60162123730, and teoweishen@gmail.com
Shawn registers again in sunwayflora.com with +60162123730, but with shawntws@sunway.com.my
Using a different email will not create another profile, but rather counts as a re-register as the same customer profile.

PMS - Uses phone number only, email only or a combination of both email and phone no to identify a lead. 

Even if customer uses a different email to register but with the same phone number, it counts as one lead profile. 

For a more detailed explanation - can refer to: FK Migration to PMS 2.0 -20092023.xlsx


Current Security Risks
  1. The same username and password for API endpoint are used.
  2. Credentials are exposed on the microsite, as it's coded on front-end. 
Mitigation
  1. Firewall-based (IP Whitelisting for PROD server)
  2. Integration code is hidden through BE
  3. Yearly credentials change.
Acceptance Criteria:
In General
  1. An API End Point that creates Lead, Lead Interest & Lead Activity in accordance to requirements
  2. For General Guideline for Lead Creation, refer to #794 
Security
  1. The API must be secured via basic username and password.
  2. The same username and password will used for all sources.
  3. At firewall level, we need the API to be protected and is only accessible for selected IP addresses (IP Whitelisting)
Tracking & Handling of Lead Creation
  1. Track the original URL / IP where lead is being created.
  2. All fields indicated in Data model () must be tracked
  3. When the API is being fired
    1. Lead -
      1. Identify if this is an existing lead, create if it's new.
      2. Identify if lead is SPAM - #824 
    2. Lead interest - 
      1. Identify based on Status:  
      2. Identify based on Project:
      3. Identify based on Active Agents:
    3. lead activity
      1. Identify based on :
        1. Created: Created Date Time
        2. Assignment: Assigned Date Time
Lead Activity Acceptance Criteria

For every online lead interest creation, 
  • the lead activity details should be recorded.  
  • Indicate whether it is created by system or user.
  • Include the source and lead interest creation date time
For lead activity fields, please refer to Data Model: Data Model.xlsx

Title: As PMS System, I want leads to be created online via Facebook/Instagram
Description:
Lead will be created using Zapier Webhook or Facebook API

Zapier acts as a connector between Facebook and PMS. An endpoint (url) will need to be provided by PMS to Zapier. Zapier will send a POST request to the endpoint provided. 

For all the existing Facebook lead gen ads forms, it should be linked with PMS2.0.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a Facebook / Instagram Advertisement
When customer fills in the information in the lead form
Then Zapier (Zaps) will collect all information from the lead form and create an online lead / lead interest by API integration/

Refer to Data Model: Data Model.xlsx - Lead Origin for fields to be mapped.
